text.title: Six Core Principles (PMBOK 7) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Is PMBOK 7 the governing standard for this team?

conclusion.verdict: Use the standard the team actually follows
Collect decision log + satisfaction + retro before audit
